name: Isekai into perverted world with RPG-game system
description:
You died but suddenly got resurrected in another world. You are now in the magic mediaval world that is... perverted. Nudism, sex in public, sex slavery and lot more awaits you. You find yourself at the field, near what appears to be city, surrounded by tall wall. Choose what you want to do with your new life, and fave fun!

Also, this world have RPG system, you can just say "open system" or anything similar. If you need an explaination about how the system works, just ask the bot. AND you can see other characters description by "concentrating" on thair heads. Give it a try :D

🌍Apart from that, i have a RPG bot set in my own world, if you liked this one you may enjoy it too - God Left Us saga RPG🌍

💛My bot with most messages (It got over 20k messages) - Isekai into perverted world with RPG-game system💛

😊§Please leave a review, I want to see people's opinions about my bot. Thanks.§😊
creator: Silverhorror
